patterns.whatChanged: Hero too standard -- text-only hero with just copper rule lacks immersion
patterns.original: Large serif headline + copper rule + basic subtext
patterns.revised: User wants: more visual depth, layered elements, closer to griflan's hero with device/image element, smaller headline, more editorial craft
patterns.pattern: Text-only heroes feel generic for agency sites. Always include a STRUCTURAL visual element for immersion.

patterns.whatChanged: Still not immersive -- gradient placeholder divs instead of real images, background too bland
patterns.original: Dark surface cards with gradient placeholders, subtle gradient mesh bg
patterns.revised: User wants REAL IMAGES, not gradient placeholders. Background needs more character. Use design-decisions.md Section 10 hero recipes.
patterns.pattern: Gradient placeholder divs look fake. Always use real images (Unsplash, picsum, etc). Hero MUST use one of the 5 spatial recipes from Section 10.

patterns.original: Third attempt still not matching reference quality (griflan level)
patterns.revised: Project abandoned. Lesson: builder must self-screenshot and HONESTLY compare to reference. Start simple, add ONE element.
patterns.pattern: Builder agent honesty gate needed. Self-screenshot + honest reference comparison before shipping.

patterns.original: Brain score 8 but observer flags missing depth layers
patterns.revised: Every feature section needs 3+ z-index values, atmospheric pseudo-elements, backdrop-filter or shadow.
patterns.pattern: Feature sections need intentional depth layers, not flat card grids. Led to RULE-011 promotion.

_meta.cleanReason: Audit V1: synced JSON with MD content. Consolidated 7 duplicate 'needs more depth' eros-test entries into 1 representative entry. Added Forge v3 kill entry from MD. 2 -> 4 entries (was 2 in JSON, 10 in MD with duplicates).
_meta.knownGap: No revision patterns captured since Forge Studio (2026-04-01). User feedback loop appears dead for subsequent projects.
